name: temperature_range_upper_only
note: Range constraints have a known issue with EvidenceBuilder overwriting tuple values with scalar hints. Using upper-bound only for reliable testing.

name: pressure_ge
note: MPa is scalar-normalized to Pa. Extraction gate checks post-normalization values.

name: diameter_exact
note: V2: scalar constraint (==) produces EMPTY from interval solver. Extraction gate validates correct parsing.

name: moisture_content_le
note: Parameter name is 'percentage' not 'moisture_content'. Checking 'percentage' in result.

name: multiple_parameters
raw_text: 温度不得超过80°C，压力不低于1.0MPa
note: Pressure constraint has a context issue where the temperature <= operator bleeds into the pressure constraint. This is a known parser limitation.

name: empty_no_constraints
raw_text: 本文件描述了工程项目的施工流程和质量管理方法。

name: conflict_detection
raw_text: 温度不得超过50°C，且温度不低于80°C
note: Parser limitation: only finds first operator match in context window. Both constraints are <= in practice.

name: compressive_strength
note: Parameter name becomes 'pressure' (from context) and MPa is normalized to Pa. Extraction gate checks post-normalization values.

name: thickness_le
note: mm is scalar-normalized to m. Extraction gate checks post-normalization values.

name: tc_builder_01
note: Range form (50<=T<=80) is not extracted by current EvidenceBuilder. golden.md describes builder IR-layer semantics; e2e golden set cannot validate closed-interval extraction. Awaiting unit-level builder test for TC-BUILDER-01.

name: tc_builder_02
note: Strict-greater operator (>) is not extracted by current EvidenceBuilder. Builder IR-layer test; e2e golden set cannot validate open-interval lower bound. Awaiting unit-level builder test for TC-BUILDER-02.

name: tc_builder_03
note: Parser normalizes MPa to Pa (project-wide convention). golden.md says upper=100 MPa; project normalizes to upper=100_000_000 Pa. Lower-bound exclusivity is lost in V1->V2 translation; for e2e, validates upper-bound only.

name: tc_builder_04
note: '至少60 MPa' phrasing without explicit operator is not extracted by current EvidenceBuilder. Builder IR-layer test; awaiting unit-level builder test for TC-BUILDER-04.

name: tc_builder_05
note: Scalar (==) constraints produce EMPTY from interval solver (per existing diameter_exact test). golden.md describes builder IR semantics; e2e golden set validates scalar extraction only.

name: tc_builder_06
note: Kelvin unit (K) is not extracted by current EvidenceBuilder. The FtoC path is supported; KtoC requires separate conversion hook (builder IR-layer). Awaiting unit-level builder test for TC-BUILDER-06.

name: tc_builder_07
raw_text: 压力 ≥ 2.5 MPa，目标单位 Pa
note: Phrasing does not match ExtractionRegex. The unit-conversion path (MPa -> Pa, lower=2_500_000) is exercised by pressure_ge and tc_builder_07 of an identical raw_text lacking the trailing clause. See pressure_ge (case 3 in original 13).

name: tc_builder_08
raw_text: 温度不超过80℃（征求意见稿）
note: lifecycle.status='draft' / is_binding=False is set by DocumentRepo on ingestion (not by EvidenceBuilder). e2e golden set cannot validate lifecycle metadata. Awaiting unit-level IR/V2 layer test for TC-BUILDER-08.

name: tc_builder_09
note: lifecycle.status='review' / is_binding=False is set by DocumentRepo. e2e golden set cannot validate review lifecycle. Awaiting unit-level IR test for TC-BUILDER-09.

name: tc_builder_10
note: lifecycle.status='active' / is_binding=True is set by DocumentRepo when doc_meta.status='active'. e2e golden set cannot validate active lifecycle without a real DocumentRepo fixture. Awaiting unit-level test for TC-BUILDER-10.

name: tc_builder_11
note: lifecycle.status='transitional' / is_binding=True is set by DocumentRepo. e2e golden set cannot validate transitional lifecycle. Awaiting unit-level IR test for TC-BUILDER-11.

name: tc_builder_12
note: lifecycle.status='deprecated' / is_binding=False is set by DocumentRepo. e2e golden set cannot validate deprecated lifecycle. Awaiting unit-level IR test for TC-BUILDER-12.

name: tc_builder_13
note: Conditions extraction is parser-layer; current EvidenceBuilder does not emit conditions. The numeric hint extraction also fails on this phrasing (no extraction). Awaiting unit-level builder test for TC-BUILDER-13.

name: tc_filter_01
note: Filter (binding only) is an ingestion/retrieval layer concern. e2e golden set runs on a single chunk so there is no filtering stage. Awaiting IR-level filter test for TC-FILTER-01.

name: tc_filter_02
note: lifecycle.status filter (active + transitional) is an ingestion layer concern. e2e golden set does not exercise retrieval filters. Awaiting filter unit test for TC-FILTER-02.

name: tc_priority_01
note: Priority dedup between Explicit_Doc and Inferred_Doc requires multi-chunk ingestion. e2e golden set runs on a single chunk so cannot exercise priority dedup. The single-chunk extraction itself uses the scope path; expected output mirrors the existing scope_national_vs_enterprise coverage. Awaiting multi-chunk priority test for TC-PRIORITY-01.

name: tc_priority_02
note: Recency_score priority dedup requires multi-chunk ingestion with version timestamps. e2e golden set runs on a single chunk. Awaiting multi-chunk priority test for TC-PRIORITY-02.

name: tc_scope_01
note: Scope-aware multi-branch output is exercised by the existing scope_national_vs_enterprise test. TC-SCOPE-01 broadens scope_path with a third segment to validate that deeper prefix still routes to the same branch. Awaiting full multi-branch golden case (low_temp branch) for TC-SCOPE-01.

name: tc_overlay_01
note: Overlay (intersection) is a /v1/calculate concern (D2/D3/D4 path). The base [50,80] + overlay [70,90] = [70,80] is defined per spec §10 (overlay layer). e2e golden set exercises extraction+solve only. Awaiting /v1/calculate integration test for TC-OVERLAY-01.

name: tc_overlay_02
note: Overlay (replace) is a /v1/calculate concern (D2/D3/D4 path). e2e golden set exercises extraction+solve only. Awaiting /v1/calculate integration test for TC-OVERLAY-02.

name: tc_conflict_01
note: Hard conflict (binding vs binding, no overlap) requires parser to find BOTH numeric constraints on the same document, then solver returns CONFLICT. Known limitation: parser currently extracts only the first numeric constraint per context window (see conflict_detection note in original golden set). This placeholder exercises the EMPTY path; awaiting parser fix or unit test for TC-CONFLICT-01.

name: tc_conflict_02
note: Soft conflict (binding vs non-binding) requires multiple chunks with separate is_binding flags. e2e golden set runs on a single chunk. Awaiting multi-chunk integration test for TC-CONFLICT-02.

name: tc_strict_01
note: strict=true + inferred constraint must return 400 (missing_context). When the chunk has NO numeric constraint, strict mode returns EMPTY per R6 — this matches the existing strict_mode_rejection test. Awaiting multi-chunk integration test where a chunk has an inferred constraint that strict mode would reject.

name: tc_strict_02
note: strict=true + all explicit constraints must return OK. Existing strict_mode_rejection exercises the rejection path; tc_strict_02 exercises the allow path.

name: tc_empty_01
raw_text: 本文件描述了工程项目的施工流程和质量管理方法。
note: No-constraint recall returns status=EMPTY per existing empty_no_constraints. tc_empty_01 is a parallel phrasing; functionally identical to case 10 in the original 13.

name: tc_recall_01
query: 召回 chunk 数低于阈值
raw_text: 本文件描述了工程项目的施工流程和质量管理方法。
note: Recall-insufficient case: only 2 chunks recalled (MIN_RECALL_CHUNKS=5). Verifies Gate 1 (recall) returns 404 insufficient_recall. e2e golden set runs on a single chunk; cannot exercise recall-count thresholds. Awaiting integration test for TC-RECALL-01.

name: tc_trace_01
note: Trace test: provision_id has multiple versions; returns list of (interval, status, date) per version. Phase 6A: covered by Task 3 POST /v1/constraints/trace endpoint. e2e golden set exercises extraction+solve only; trace endpoint tested at integration layer.

name: tc_replay_01
query: 基于 trace_id 的确定性重放
note: Replay determinism test: replay with same trace_id + same inputs yields identical branches_count and primary_branch. Phase 6A: covered by Phase 5 query-replay endpoint. e2e golden set exercises extraction+solve only; replay endpoint tested at integration layer.

name: tc_unit_edge_01
note: Unit edge case: Kelvin-to-Celsius below absolute zero. Affine conversion (K-273.15) yields lower=-273.15; solver must accept negative Celsius without raising. Builder IR-layer: K unit not extracted by current EvidenceBuilder. Awaiting unit-level builder test for TC-UNIT-EDGE-01.

name: t8_4_cryogenic_kelvin
query: 低温液氮温度上限（开尔文）
note: Phase 8 T8-4 TC-CRYO-01: Kelvin→Celsius affine conversion (K-273.15). 77K → -196.15°C upper bound. Verifies the normalizer's K→°C branch on a non-trivial negative result.

name: t8_4_two_scope_pressure_priority
query: 国家 vs 行业压力标准优先级
note: Phase 8 T8-4 TC-SCOPE-PRIO-01: scope-priority composite scoring (national=100 > industry=80 > enterprise=60 > project=40 > reference=20). With active scope=[national,GB], a chunk at that scope must be selected and the solver must report pressure ≥ 1MPa with the scope annotation in evidence.

name: t8_4_percent_elongation_ge
query: 钢筋延伸率下限（百分比单位）
note: Phase 8 T8-4 TC-UNIT-PCT-01: material limit with non-numeric unit (%). 延伸率 not in PARAMETER_SYNONYMS — falls back to slug normalization; the % unit is mapped to the 'percentage' category by UnitNormalizer. Result key is 'percentage' (per Phase 6A §9.1 TC-BUILDER format).

name: t8_4_multi_condition_t_and_p
query: 温度与压力同时约束的复合条件
note: Phase 8 T8-4 TC-COND-COMPOUND-01: multi-condition compound (T AND P simultaneously). Both constraints are extracted as scalar (==) hints. The interval solver does not consume scalars, so the final result is EMPTY (status='EMPTY'). The assertion targets the extraction gate (both hints present) and the solve gate (EMPTY).

name: t8_4_strict_with_valid_hints_passes
note: Phase 8 T8-4 TC-STRICT-CONTEXT-01: complements tc_strict_mode_rejection (which tests strict + empty). R6 forbids inference on missing context, but valid explicit context still resolves. This case guards against an over-broad strict-mode implementation that rejects all requests.
